Where it all began, in 1995
A Letter from the Founder

The seed has always been ours to grow.
Today, it is also ours to give.

Dear Farmer Friend,

For more than three decades, our family has lived in the seed fields of Telangana — first as farmers, then as seed organisers and producers. We grew up inside India's seed supply chain. We learned its standards, mastered its protocols, and watched what good seed does in a real farmer's field.

"A farmer's season depends on the seed in his hand. We take that responsibility seriously — because in agriculture, trust is not written on paper, it is proven at harvest."

Over the years, a quiet question took root in the soil beneath our feet: what if we brought that same quality to farmers under our own name? Today, every packet that leaves our Telangana facility carries our family name. That is not a small thing.

We are not the biggest seed company in India. We do not claim to be. But we stand behind every seed we sell — because it comes from the same fields, the same hands and the same dryer that have produced quality seed at the highest standards demanded in this country, season after season for over sixty seasons.

Welcome to Yellina.

In Telugu
మీ రైతు మిత్రునికి —
తెలంగాణలోని మా పొలాల్లో 30+ ఏళ్లుగా అత్యున్నత ప్రమాణాలతో విత్తనం పండిస్తున్నాము. ఇప్పుడు అదే నాణ్యత మా సొంత పేరుతో మీ చేతికి.
Our Promise
If the seed is right, the season is right. Every packet, every season.

Page 03
Yellina Seeds
Chapter IIWhy Yellina
Four Reasons to Choose Yellina

What makes our seed different in your field.

We are not a new company learning the business. We are a thirty-plus-year seed producer bringing our own hybrids — built on the same discipline that India's most exacting seed networks demand.

Below, the four commitments that shape every pack of Yellina seed from our Telangana facility to your field.

01
We know your field.
Our seed is bred, tested and proven on Indian soil — not imported genetics with a foreign stamp. From Khammam to Dewas to Patna, a Yellina hybrid is shaped by 30+ years of real seasons, real rains, and our neighbours' fields.
02
We own our drying.
Moisture ruins more seed than pests do. Our drying & processing plant is ours — not rented, not shared. Every seed is dried under our supervision, so our germination numbers hold in the field, not just on the label.
03
Our family name on every pack.
Yellina is not a brand invented by an agency — it is a family name. When something goes right, we hear about it. When something goes wrong, we hear about it faster, and we fix it. Small enough to answer the phone, large enough to stand behind what we sell.
04
We show up at harvest.
A Yellina pack is the start of a relationship, not the end of a sale. Our team visits farmers through the season — the way our family has worked the seed fields for three decades. Your field is where our next hybrid is born.
Yellina Seeds · Chapter II · Why Yellina

Yellina Seeds
Chapter IIIQuality Promise
Quality, Proven at Every Pack

The truthful label is the floor.
What we deliver is the ceiling.

95%
Genetic Purity
Minimum · all hybrids
98%
Physical Purity
Minimum · all varieties
90%
Germination
Maize · minimum
80%
Germination
Paddy · minimum
The Indian Seed Act, 1966 Every pack conforms to germination & purity standards under Indian law — with our own stamp of accountability on top.

Our quality promise to every farmer and dealer.

A truthful label is the legal minimum. At Yellina, it is the floor we start from — not the bar we are trying to clear.

Produced under our own supervision — parent seed to pack, same hands, same fields.
Dried in our own facility — moisture is where germination dies.
Lot-tested before packing — germination & purity checked every lot, not just sampled.
Treated with Thiram 40% & Deltamethrin 2.5% — protected from seed-borne disease & storage pests.
Traceable packaging — lot number on every pack for full traceability.
Make in India — produced, packed & marketed from Telangana.

Chapter IVOur Maize
Hybrid Maize Portfolio

Three hybrids, bred for Indian kharif & rabi.

No single hybrid suits every field. We have three proven hybrid maize varieties — each chosen for a different combination of duration, soil and season.

How to read this portfolio Choose by duration (days to harvest), season (Kharif / Rabi), and your soil & rainfall conditions. When in doubt, ask your Yellina dealer.

Chapter VIOur Paddy
Paddy Portfolio

Five paddy varieties, bred for India's rice belt.

Three hybrid paddy varieties for farmers who want yield, and two improved paddy varieties for those who want reliability and market preference.

How to read this portfolio Consider kitchen preference (long-slender vs bold short grain), duration (120–145 days), and end-market (home, mandi, mill). When in doubt, ask your Yellina dealer.
Variety Duration Season Recommended Region

MR 10
120–125 days

Chapter VIIWhat's Next
Coming Soon to Our Portfolio

Wheat & Mustard — next from our fields.

After three decades of producing maize and paddy in our Telangana fields, we are extending our portfolio to two crops that share the same fundamentals — tested in real fields, dried in our own facility, traceable to the lot.

Below, what we are putting in the ground now and when you will see it on your dealer's shelf.

04
Wheat · coming soon
Hybrid and high-yielding variety lines for India's wheat belt — from Punjab to UP to MP. Parent-seed multiplication and field validation underway with our partner network. Drought tolerance and rust resistance are the breeding priorities.
Target launch · Rabi 2027
05
Mustard · coming soon
Hybrid mustard for the rabi cycle in central and northern India. High-oil-content selections in trial across our breeding plots. Aphid and white-rust tolerance sit at the centre of our selection programme.
Target launch · Rabi 2027
For Dealers & Distributors

If you serve farmers in north or central India and want to be among the first to stock Yellina wheat or mustard, we want to hear from you. See Chapter IX to get in touch.

Early Partner
Programme
Yellina Seeds · Chapter VII · What's Next
Page 18
Yellina Seeds
Chapter VIIIAgronomy
Farmer's Field Guide

From sowing to harvest — our guidance at every stage.

01 Land preparation

  • Plough deep (20–25 cm) to break compacted soil
  • Add FYM 4–5 tonnes per acre before final harrow
  • Fine tilth for paddy, good aggregate for maize
  • Soil test every 2 years — we can help arrange

02 Sowing & spacing

  • Maize: 60 × 20 cm · 8–10 kg seed/acre
  • Hybrid Paddy: 20 × 15 cm · 6–8 kg/acre
  • Improved Paddy: 20 × 15 cm · 20–25 kg/acre
  • Sweet Corn: 60 × 25 cm · 5–6 kg/acre

03 Fertilizer schedule

  • Basal: full P & K, 1/3 N at sowing
  • Top-dress 1: 1/3 N at 30–35 days (knee-high)
  • Top-dress 2: 1/3 N at tasselling / panicle initiation
  • Zinc & boron for grain filling — apply at flowering

04 Pests & diseases

  • Fall armyworm: scout weekly; spray at 5% leaf damage
  • Stem borer (paddy): use pheromone traps as early warning
  • Blast: avoid excess N; use tolerant varieties
  • Always rotate chemistries — ask your Yellina dealer

Sowing & harvest calendar

Chapter IXPartner With Us
For Dealers & Distributors

A brand worth putting on your shelf.

Yellina is a young brand, but built on an old relationship with seed production. We are looking for dealers and distributors across India's agricultural heartland — from Punjab to Tamil Nadu, Gujarat to Bihar.

If you run a farm-input shop, an agri-cooperative, or a rural retail network — and you want a seed brand your farmers will come back to — we would like to hear from you.

Why partner with Yellina Our brand is new, so our commitment to your shop is higher — we invest in demos, visits, and farmer relationships where others send only pack and invoice.
Healthy margin, steady demand

Competitive margins compared to other regional brands, with hybrid pricing anchored to farmer economics.

Field support & demos

Yellina team conducts farmer field days, demo plots, and variety demonstrations in your territory.

Fast complaint resolution

Every complaint reaches a Yellina family member directly. No layers, no delays — we own what we sell.

Your direct line to the family.
